item.title: word_count
item.description: Vault Stats This vault currently contains 15,717 words across all notes.

item.title: Tight elbows
item.description: Always remain cognizant of your elbows.

item.title: High mount
item.description: General Advancement from regular mount where your knees are on opponents armpits. This should allow some finishes like Triangle, Armbar, Wristlock.

item.title: Mount
item.description: General Highly advantageous position sitting on opponents waist.

item.title: Target joint
item.description: Å2QQO.## General Depending on where you are currently positioned you need to consider different joints as your primary target to pass or control.

item.title: Quarter mount
item.description: General Almost a Mount, but the bottom player still has shin or ankle caught.

item.title: S Mount
item.description: General This mount gets it’s name from the position of the legs. Typically used from Mount position.

item.title: Four points
item.description: General While opponent is on their back (Side control & Mount) consider that they have four point of control.

item.title: Technique circle
item.description: General Judo concept that is based on having 8 directional “compass” and all the takedowns and throws can be performed in certain directions.

item.title: Sacrifice throw
item.description: General Subtype of throws where you also fall on the mat.
